scripts.dev: concurrently -n BE,FE -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
